rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). The cited rule governs criminal history reviews for noncertified school employees. The two provisions share no subject matter overlap; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 22.0833. NATIONAL CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD INFORMATION REVIEW OF NONCERTIFIED EMPLOYEES.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and the criminal history review statute. Rule is entirely unrelated to property taxation or homestead exemptions.
